title: Mobs Revenge
description: The mod adds new mobs, items, and tools with special properties.
body:
# Mobs Revenge
**The mod is based on an old Minecraft mod called Mobs Revenge. It adds new mobs and expands the mod with many new materials, food, and newer mobs that didn't even exist back then. Many villager trades have also been added, many of them for the Wandering Trader. There are also two for the Fisherman.**

# new mobs
**The mod adds several new mobs, from fire sheep to Nija chickens and new zombie variants; there's a lot included.**

# new itemes tools and weappons
**The mod also adds many new items, tools, and equipment; from new dust variants to new bow and crossbow variants, many ores are represented.**

# new recipes
**New recipes have also been added for the new Dust variants and other tools and implements. From new TNT recipes that can be crafted with all Dust versions to other recipes for tools, implements, and food, you have many ways to acquire the new items.**

# new villager trades
**New villager trades have also been added for the toolsmith, weaponsmith, fisherman, and wandering trader, making it possible to obtain the new items as well.**
